requirement_topic.en: Customs Import Clearance — Direction Générale des Douanes
requirement_topic.zh: 进口通关 — 海关总署
requirement_topic.zht: 進口清關 — 海關總署

summary.en: Import of wireless and telecom terminal equipment into Tunisia is subject to customs clearance by the Direction Générale des Douanes (Tunisian customs authority). Importers must present a valid INT homologation certificate at customs; equipment without homologation may be detained or refused entry. Applicable import duties and VAT apply to wireless devices. Tunisia's EU Association Agreement (Euro-Mediterranean Agreement) may reduce or eliminate duties on qualifying goods of EU origin but does not apply to Chinese-origin goods. A commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading or airway bill, and certificate of origin are standard customs documentation requirements.
summary.zh: 无线及电信终端设备进口至突尼斯须通过海关总署（突尼斯海关机构）完成通关。进口商须在海关提交有效的INT型式核准证书；未经型式核准的设备可能被扣押或拒绝入境。适用于无线设备的进口关税和增值税照章征收。突尼斯与欧盟签订的联系协定（欧地中海协定）可对符合条件的欧盟原产商品减免关税，但不适用于中国原产商品。商业发票、装箱单、提单或空运单及原产地证书是标准的海关文件要求。
summary.zht: 無線及電信終端裝置進口至突尼斯須通過海關總署（突尼斯海關機構）完成清關。進口商須在海關提交有效的INT型式核准證書；未經型式核准的裝置可能被扣押或拒絕入境。適用於無線裝置的進口關稅和增值稅照章徵收。突尼斯與歐盟簽訂的聯繫協定（歐地中海協定）可對符合條件的歐盟原產商品減免關稅，但不適用於中國原產商品。商業發票、裝箱單、提單或空運單及原產地證書是標準的海關文件要求。

standards_or_laws: Tunisian Customs Code (Code des Douanes — Loi no. 89-56 du 8 mars 1989, as amended)
Euro-Mediterranean Association Agreement between Tunisia and the EU (1998, as implemented) — preferential duties for qualifying EU-origin goods; does not apply to Chinese-origin goods
Direction Générale des Douanes import procedures for telecom and radio equipment
INT homologation certificate required at customs for telecom terminal equipment

summary.en: Exports from China to third countries are subject to Chinese customs export procedures (Haiguan — General Administration of Customs of China, GACC). Export of wireless devices requires a valid export declaration, commercial invoice, packing list, and bill of lading or airway bill. SRRC and CCC certificates are Chinese domestic market requirements and are not import documents for Tunisia. No Chinese export certificate substitutes for Tunisian customs requirements.
summary.zh: 中国向第三国的出口须经中国海关（海关总署，GACC）完成出口手续。无线设备出口须提交有效的出口申报单、商业发票、装箱单及提单或空运单。SRRC和CCC证书是中国国内市场要求，不属于突尼斯的进口文件。中国出口证书均不能替代突尼斯海关要求。
summary.zht: 中國向第三國的出口須經中國海關（海關總署，GACC）完成出口手續。無線裝置出口須提交有效的出口申報單、商業發票、裝箱單及提單或空運單。SRRC和CCC證書是中國國內市場要求，不屬於突尼斯的進口文件。中國出口證書均不能替代突尼斯海關要求。

standards_or_laws: GACC (General Administration of Customs of China) export declaration procedures
China export documentation: commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading / airway bill, export customs declaration

gap.en: Chinese-origin wireless devices do not benefit from preferential import duty treatment under Tunisia's EU Association Agreement. Full Tunisian customs duties and VAT apply. The INT homologation certificate must be presented at customs; goods without a valid homologation certificate risk detention or seizure. Importers must ensure all standard customs documents (invoice, packing list, bill of lading, certificate of origin) are prepared in French or Arabic as required by Tunisian customs.
gap.zh: 中国原产无线设备不受突尼斯欧盟联系协定项下优惠进口关税待遇保护。须缴纳全额突尼斯进口关税和增值税。INT型式核准证书须在海关提交；未持有有效型式核准证书的货物面临被扣押或没收的风险。进口商须确保所有标准海关文件（发票、装箱单、提单、原产地证书）按突尼斯海关要求以法语或阿拉伯语备齐。
gap.zht: 中國原產無線裝置不受突尼斯歐盟聯繫協定項下優惠進口關稅待遇保護。須繳納全額突尼斯進口關稅和增值稅。INT型式核准證書須在海關提交；未持有有效型式核准證書的貨物面臨被扣押或沒收的風險。進口商須確保所有標準海關文件（發票、裝箱單、提單、原產地證書）按突尼斯海關要求以法語或阿拉伯語備齊。

source.publisher: Direction Générale des Douanes — Republic of Tunisia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese-origin wireless devices are subject to full Tunisian import duties and VAT with no preferential tariff rate under the EU Association Agreement. A valid INT homologation certificate is required at customs clearance; devices without homologation are at risk of detention or refusal of entry. Standard French or Arabic customs documentation must accompany each shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国原产无线设备须缴纳全额突尼斯进口关税和增值税，不享受欧盟联系协定下的优惠税率。有效的INT型式核准证书为海关通关所必需；未经型式核准的设备面临被扣押或拒绝入境的风险。每批货物须附有标准的法语或阿拉伯语海关文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國原產無線裝置須繳納全額突尼斯進口關稅和增值稅，不享受歐盟聯繫協定下的優惠稅率。有效的INT型式核准證書為海關清關所必需；未經型式核准的裝置面臨被扣押或拒絕入境的風險。每批貨物須附有標準的法語或阿拉伯語海關文件。
